MODULE: cosmos.tools.security.vulnerability_scanner
FILE: cosmos/tools/security/vulnerability_scanner.py (604 lines)
CATEGORY: tools

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Vulnerability Scanner

"Good news, everyone! I've created a scanner that finds weaknesses before the bad guys do!"

Comprehensive vulnerability scanning for authorized security testing.
IMPORTANT: Only use with proper authorization on systems you own or have permission to test.

CLASSES:
- VulnerabilitySeverity(Enum): Vulnerability severity levels.
- VulnerabilityCategory(Enum): Categories of vulnerabilities.
- Vulnerability: A detected vulnerability.
- VulnerabilityReport: Complete vulnerability scan report.
  Methods: def critical_count(self) -> int
  Methods: def high_count(self) -> int
  Methods: def medium_count(self) -> int
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- VulnerabilityScanner: Comprehensive vulnerability scanner.

For authorized security testing only.

Fea
  Methods: async def scan(self, target: str, scan_type: str='full', ports: Optional[List[int]]=None) -> Vulnera
  Methods: def generate_html_report(self, report: VulnerabilityReport) -> str
